## Linked issue

Closes #

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor / cleanup
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Security fix (please read `SECURITY.md`)
- [ ] CI / infrastructure

## Checklist

- [ ] My branch is up to date with `main`.
- [ ] `ruff check .` and `ruff format --check .` pass.
- [ ] `pytest` passes.
- [ ] `npx tsc --noEmit` and `npm run build` pass.
- [ ] I added tests for the behaviour I changed, including error paths.
- [ ] I updated `CHANGELOG.md` under `[Unreleased]`.
- [ ] I updated `.env.example` / docs for any new configuration.
- [ ] I did not commit secrets, real PHI, or large binary fixtures.
